_comment: Frozen baseline copied from plugin-kiln/tests/kiln-report-issue-batching-perf/results-2026-04-24-with-tokens.tsv at commit b81aa25. thresholds._threshold_note: 120% of baseline medians. Post-PRD median MUST be <= these values to pass NFR-F-4.
